Powered by Korean patented polyphenol technology, it offers safe, natural grey coverage without harsh chemicals, leaving hair darker, fuller, and healthier with every wash.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 296
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 303
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 237
programme.desc: FEM & HOM Fortify Hair Loss Bundle restore scalp health and reduce hair fall for both men and women with thinning hair concerns.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 298
programme.desc: Tiger, a trusted century-old brand! Vacuum food jars and flasks keep meals and drinks hot or cold for 6 hours—lightweight, leak-proof, and easy to carry, perfect for meal prep or on-the-go. The compact multi-function rice cooker features an ultra-thick inner pot and versatile menus like Eco, Quick Cook, Porridge, Brown Rice, and Cake, keeping rice warm up to 12 hours with evenly cooked, fluffy results—ideal for small families.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 223
programme.desc: The secret weapon for effortless cleaning.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 220
programme.desc: Promotes and Enhances Liver Health with Thomson Livrin!

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S8 - EP 22 进击的台湾 S8
programme.desc: "Hello Taiwan" strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: Tasty Taiwan 100 - EP 9 台湾百味
programme.desc: This program specializes in recommending gourmet restaurants from every corners of Taiwan, bringing Taiwan cuisine to more people, as well as the moving stories behind the restaurants.

programme.title: The Second Husband - EP 69 第二任丈夫
programme.desc: Feng Shanhua overcomes various hardships even after being wrongly accused. This is a story of fate, love, secrets and forgiveness that stem from her relationship with her two families, one of her birth mother and the other of the mother who raised her.

programme.title: Love Destiny S2 - EP 36 天生一对 2
programme.desc: Master Qibakao wants Pudan to make a choice between staying in Ayutthaya and the modern era. Yin comforts Xiaoban who becomes saddened when she sees Lien and her mother crying.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 37 真的出现了!
programme.desc: As Junhe is held in high esteem by Chairman Kong, he deliberately asks for Shizhen to be appointed as his personal secretary. Shizhen is furious, but she has no choice except to agree.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 38 真的出现了!
programme.desc: Shizhen finds out that the person who sent the anonymous letter is her father. Deeply shaken, she abandons everything and runs to the temple.

programme.title: The Land of Spirits - EP 4 众神之地
programme.desc: By the late 20th century, Siberian tigers had nearly vanished from China due to deforestation and war. Determined to restore the land where every mountain had a tiger, villagers, rangers, and scientists worked for years to rebuild its habitat. As the forest healed, hope returned. In the first Year of the Tiger of the 21st century, a female tiger named October appeared — proof the species could thrive again.

programme.title: Feud - EP 24 临江仙
programme.desc: Hua Ruyue uses deception to get close to and seal Bai Jiusi in order to bring Shi An back to life

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Warna Ramadan - EP 20
programme.desc: As Syawal draws near, Episode 20 of Warna Ramadan captures the spirit of celebration from every angle. In GAYA, we explore this year’s trending Baju Raya colours and patterns, followed by SEMBANG, where Muslim expats share their experiences celebrating Ramadan and Raya in Singapore. HIDANG takes us inside a celebrity home for a special visit, while CABAR features Seriwahyuni Jaes and Mastura Ahmad stepping up to the challenge.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 16
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 17
programme.desc: Qaisara learns she is not Fatimah’s biological child and turns to Maman for answers, only to be exploited for money. Meanwhile, a scorned Linda teams up with Leo to plot the Farouk's downfall.

programme.title: Wanita Syurga - EP 7
programme.desc: Amar advances in his career and transitions to a new office, where he meets his new boss, Farah, whom he finds obnoxious. He must manage her demands in the workplace.

programme.title: Gerimis Di Hati Sr 1 - EP 10
programme.desc: As the sole breadwinner with a monthly income of less than 1500, Nizam struggles to care for his wife, Alifah, and two children. Alifah wishes to have her father and handicapped brother stay with her, and Nizam feels immense pressure to earn more money so that the family can upgrade to a bigger apartment. But Nizam was tricked by his sister Nana to take a loan on her behalf and he is forced to sell his current apartment to pay for the loan.

programme.title: Jalan Ampas - EP 1
programme.desc: Jalan Ampas is a drama of two parellel storylines - one a period drama and the other an investigative melodrama set in the present.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 20
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Detik Semasa - EP 27
programme.desc: This Ramadan episode takes a light and colourful look at how kuih raya reaches Singapore homes. From local home-based bakers and store-bought favourites that are shipped from Malaysia to picked up delicacies on Johor trips, it celebrates the sweet choices, nostalgia and small adventures behind every kuih Raya.

programme.title: Sembang Sihat S3 - EP 10
programme.desc: Hosted by Ainon Talib and Zuhairi Idris, Sembang Sihat takes on a fresh, gripping new direction — blending health education with medical mystery storytelling to create a more interactive, relatable, and engaging viewer experience.

programme.title: Remuk - EP 4
programme.desc: Noor admits her friend sent the anonymous photo of Malik, leading to a public confrontation with Liza that goes viral. As tensions rise, Khairul struggles with his paralysis, Melissa is released from prison, and Cik Samad continues hiding a painful family secret from Noor.

programme.title: Riuh-Riuh Ramadan S3 - EP 5

Madhan is heartbroken when he sees another man holding her hand. Later that day, Suseela is seen persuading Segar to encourage Shangkari to remarry.

programme.title: Thayangaathey - EP 13
programme.desc: Thayangaathey, is a health documentary-drama, that is centred around 13 unique case studies who suffer from chronic, life-altering diseases. The intent of the programme is to educate viewers of these illnesses, the symptoms to look out for, the probability of them succumbing to these illnesses, early detection and so on.

(25 out of 39)

programme.title: River Monsters - Alligator Gar
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade heads to Texas on the trail of the vicious alligator gar.

programme.title: River Monsters - Hidden Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to South Africa, where the biggest bull shark ever recorded was caught.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killers from the Abyss (Part 2)
programme.desc: Fishing detective, Jeremy Wade, continues the biggest investigation of his career.

programme.title: River Monsters - Freshwater Shark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the myth of the freshwater shark.

programme.title: River Monsters - American Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits tourist hotspots in the USA in search of river monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters - Demon Fish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade journeys up the Congo River in search of the ferocious Goliath Tiger Fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Amazon Titanic
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the sinking on the Amazon of the Sobral Santos.

programme.title: River Monsters - Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy goes on a dangerous mission where he discovers a deep-sea devil.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on the hunt for the notorious killer catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - South Pacific Terrors
programme.desc: Attacks from unseen assailants in the remote mountains and jungles of Fiji's interior.

programme.title: River Monsters - Africa's Deadliest
programme.desc: Wildlife series. Jeremy Wade investigates the ferocious and carnivorous tigerfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: Two men mysteriously vanish on a remote lake in Malaysia.

programme.title: River Monsters - Russian Killer
programme.desc: The disappearance of three men in Russia proves to be a baffling case for Jeremy Wade.

programme.title: River Monsters - Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Could the original River Monster be back from the brink and back in business?

programme.title: River Monsters - Pack of Teeth
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in southern Africa on the banks of the Okavango.

programme.title: River Monsters - Congo Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo River on the trail of the legend of the spirit Mami Wata.

programme.title: River Monsters - River Of Blood
programme.desc: In Argentina, Jeremy Wade hunts for a vicious predator known as the 'River Tiger'.

programme.title: River Monsters - Electric Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Brazil in search of a fish that has already killed three cowboys.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killer Snakehead
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates whether the snakehead deserves its fearsome reputation.

programme.title: River Monsters - Canadian Horror
programme.desc: The hunt for a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans in Canada's wilderness.

programme.title: River Monsters - Phantom Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Australia's Fitzroy River on his toughest quest yet.

programme.title: River Monsters - Alaska's Cold Water Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates a fatal incident in Alaska - is an unidentified killer at large?

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Killer Sharks and Rays
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade relives some of his most dangerous catches.

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - The Deadliest Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade relives some of his most frightening encounters with catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Untold Stories
programme.desc: Jeremy opens up and reveals some of the funnier, crazier, and downright scarier 'monster moments' that never made the final cut

programme.title: River Monsters: Top Ten - River Monsters: Top Ten
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade brings together the top ten biggest and baddest catches of his career.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade explores the Essequibo, Guyana's largest river.

programme.title: River Monsters: Lair of Giants - Lair of Giants (Part 2)
programme.desc: Jeremy continues his exploration of South Africa's rivers and lakes.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Consideration - EP122
programme.desc: In this episode we will understand that prudence is related to common sense and caution, to think about what you are going to say and when you can say it. Discretion is to behave in a way that does not offend anyone or reveal information. If you want to be discreet, you have to act with caution! You should think first of the consequences of your actions in order to make the best decisions.

programme.title: Europa
programme.desc: Kamal has fled Iraq to try to enter "Fortress Europe". At the Turkish-Bulgarian border, local mercenaries are ruthlessly hunting down migrants. Alone in the forest, Kamal has three days to escape.

programme.title: Forever-Forever
programme.desc: In late 90s Kyiv, rebellious Tonia joins a gang, seeking protection and belonging. Amidst the ruins of the post-soviet city, she finds herself tangled up in a secret love triangle and confronting her abusive past.

programme.title: Our Children
programme.desc: A doctor brings a boy to Belgium and raises him as his own. When the boy reaches manhood, he gets married and starts his own family, but he still relies on the doctor, his adoptive father. When trouble strikes his family, dependence turns into domination.

programme.title: Traces Of Sandalwood
programme.desc: Adopted and living in Spain for years, a young woman returns to Mumbai to discover her roots, accompanied by a handsome Indian guide whom she romances.

programme.title: Deep In The Wood
programme.desc: During the Krampus festival, little Tommi disappears mysteriously in the woods. He is found 5 years later in a building site on the outskirts of Naples, but his parents and the town locals are suspicious and frightened by his strange behaviour.

programme.title: To My Beloved
programme.desc: Fernando is a good man who takes care of his only child, Daniel. Following the death of his wife Ana, every night Fernando recalls their love as he sorts out his beloved dead spouse’s belongings. One day he finds a VHS tape that will change everything.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Perched Forest
programme.desc: Commissioner Macéna shows Captain Kandinsky a letter from a ten-year-old boy who claims that a monster in his village forest is behind a string of disappearances. Kandinsky begins the investigation when the boy threatens to confront the culprit himself.

programme.title: Passed by Censor
programme.desc: In an Istanbul prison, Zakir is tasked with reading and censoring the letters inmates receive. Tasked with a writing assignment for his night class, Zakir uses a photograph of an inmate's wife for inspiration, but fantasy soon morphs into delusion.

programme.title: Red Eagle
programme.desc: A Summit between France, England, Portugal and the Pope is to take place in Spain, under the guise of looking for a solution to the conflict between Spain and Portugal; but the ulterior motive is to attack the Kingdom of Spain.

programme.title: The Vanishing Soldier
programme.desc: An 18-year-old Israeli soldier flees the Gaza battlefield and heads back to his girlfriend in Tel Aviv only to discover that the military elite is convinced he was kidnapped in the fog of war.

programme.title: Europa
programme.desc: Kamal has fled Iraq to try to enter "Fortress Europe". At the Turkish-Bulgarian border, local mercenaries are ruthlessly hunting down migrants. Alone in the forest, Kamal has three days to escape.

programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: You Are Not Alone
programme.desc: When Eva returns to her house on the day of her divorce, she finds a bouquet of red roses outside the door. Attached is the note: "You are not alone." The sender is anonymous.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Temptation of Evil
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky is called upon to investigate the death of a dentist whose body was found charred. Kandinsky doubts the official verdict of suicide when he discovers two other victims whose bodies were also found charred in the same region.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Revival Shampoo
programme.desc: A breakthrough 4-in-1 formula that colors, nourishes, volumizes, and strengthens hair—while improving scalp health in just 5 days. programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (37 out of 39)

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade looks at dark and deadly creatures - parasites.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes a look back some of the killer fish he has encountered in the series.

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Lethal Legends

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - The Deadliest Encounters

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Killer Sharks and Rays
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade relives some of his most dangerous catches.

programme.title: River Monsters: Top Ten - River Monsters: Top Ten
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade brings together the top ten biggest and baddest catches of his career.

programme.desc: Jeremy continues his exploration of South Africa's rivers and lakes.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Himalayas to investigate river attacks.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Moral & Ethics - EP123
programme.desc: In this episode, we will go through everything related to Moral and Ethics. We will learn that morality helps us make good decisions and act responsibly all the time. Being ethical means being respectful, honest, kind and trustworthy.

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Karaoke Crushers!

programme.title: Passed by Censor
programme.desc: In an Istanbul prison, Zakir is tasked with reading and censoring the letters inmates receive. Tasked with a writing assignment for his night class, Zakir uses a photograph of an inmate's wife for inspiration, but fantasy soon morphs into delusion.

programme.title: The Vanishing Soldier
programme.desc: An 18-year-old Israeli soldier flees the Gaza battlefield and heads back to his girlfriend in Tel Aviv only to discover that the military elite is convinced he was kidnapped in the fog of war.

programme.title: To My Beloved
programme.desc: Fernando is a good man who takes care of his only child, Daniel. Following the death of his wife Ana, every night Fernando recalls their love as he sorts out his beloved dead spouse’s belongings. One day he finds a VHS tape that will change everything.

programme.title: Hard Shell, Soft Shell
programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: Room 514
programme.desc: When Anna, a young, idealistic Israeli military investigator, confronts an elite officer with accusations of unnecessary violence against a Palestinian man in the Occupied Territories, her integrity and determination are challenged.

programme.title: You Are Not Alone
programme.desc: When Eva returns to her house on the day of her divorce, she finds a bouquet of red roses outside the door. Attached is the note: "You are not alone." The sender is anonymous.

programme.title: Future is a Lonely Place
programme.desc: Seeking revenge for his family’s death, Frank stages a crime and turns himself in to infiltrate a prison drug ring. Frank aims to get close to the man responsible for their death, and forms a dangerous bond with a guard along the way.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Temptation of Evil
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky is called upon to investigate the death of a dentist whose body was found charred. Kandinsky doubts the official verdict of suicide when he discovers two other victims whose bodies were also found charred in the same region.

programme.title: Risks And Side Effects
programme.desc: When Pilates trainer Kathrin needs a new kidney, her husband’s hesitation to be her donor results in a crisis in their marriage. Faced with issues of life and death, the fragility of the couple’s relationship is laid bare.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater
programme.desc: When Emma has to leave her picture-perfect life for a women's shelter, covered in bruises and unexpectedly pregnant, her unlikely friendship with a ragtag group of women pushes them all into a fight to take back their power.

programme.title: Hunters On A White Field
programme.desc: Deep in the Swedish woods, three friends go on an extended weekend hunting trip. After an initial spell of success, the animals suddenly vanish without a trace. Despite being in a forest without animals, the men decide that the hunt must continue.

programme.title: In His Hands
programme.desc: Clara, a lawyer, leads a serene but monotonous life alongside her husband Damien and their two children. One evening, she succumbs to the charm of a mysterious sculptor. This one scorching night will have dramatic repercussions for her and her family.

programme.title: Moon's Walking
programme.desc: On the day of her grandmother’s memorial, 16-year-old Jung-hee escapes a volatile home and goes on a journey in search for the truth behind her grandfather’s disappearance.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows The Detective And The Fear
programme.desc: When Inspector Martin Brühl awakens in the morning, he is alarmed by partner Susanne Koch’s absence. Unbeknownst to him, Susanne witnessed a crime on her nightly walk home. Critically injured in an ATM explosion, she was kidnapped by the perpetrators.

programme.title: Ghost Mountaineer
programme.desc: In the former Soviet Union, a group of Estonian students go hiking in Siberia. After their unpopular leader Olle vanishes, his rival Eero leads the group to seek help, and a series of bizarre and terrifying events unfold.
